title: Can You Bring It: Bill T. Jones and D-Man in the Waters
original_title: Can You Bring It: Bill T. Jones and D-Man in the Waters
overview: The remarkable history and legacy of one of the most important works of art to come out of the age of AIDS -- Bill T. Jones’ tour-de-force ballet "D-Man in the Waters."
